offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient timesheet data entry causes delayed payments. We automate data extraction and summarization instead of manual timesheet entry and calculation in QuickBooks.
problem: Delayed payments due to inefficient timesheet data processing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for QuickBooks freelancers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to freelancers with demo videos
Community forums for QuickBooks tool discussions
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
